# 💎 GEMINI NEURAL MANIFEST

> **Timestamp**: 2026-03-24 09:30:44
> **Active Mind**: ALFRED

## 🧩 Context Anchors
- **Project Root**: `/home/morderith/Corvus/CStar`
- **Persona Strategy**: `personas.py -> alfred`
- **Framework Port**: 3000 (Odin Dashboard)

## ⏭️ Priority Directives
- **Queue**: 4 open / 0 in progress / 9 ready for review / 415 needs triage / 5 blocked / 20 resolved
- **Next Bead**: `bead:chant-session:5657f1ac-956c-4048-bfbd-e1feadcaa698:cb-engine-1` -> `.stats/pennyone.db` :: Investigate and resolve Linscott rule breaches within the Python Engine.

## 📜 Recent Continuity (Git)
```text
050a8053 feat: implement MemOS-inspired episodic memory (Engrams) and purge legacy skills
e62e8b61 feat: level 5 diagnostic core-only refocus and estate cleanup
3690d073 feat: Complete Level 5 Diagnostic restoration and cleanup
e5f4dee8 chore: mark pending skill authority files as work in progress
97401c18 feat: route chant through autobot and codex host sessions
```

## 🛠️ System Health
- **Code Sentinel**: PASS
- **Fishtest Accuracy**: 94.7%
- **Operational Buffer**: STABLE
